member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod
member.summary: Fuse At Class test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.SharedStorageContext
member.summary: The context of the shared storage.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.SharedStorageContext.LOT
member.summary: Data is shared across DUTs and IPs

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.SharedStorageContext.DUT
member.summary: Data is shared across all IPs under current DUT Data is not shared across different parallel DUTs in mDUT.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.FactExecutionMode
member.summary: Represents fact execution modes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.FactExecutionMode.OFF
member.summary: This mode will skip the fact execution.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.FactExecutionMode.LotLevel
member.summary: This will execute the lot level mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.FactExecutionMode.UnitLevel
member.summary: This will execute the lot unit mode.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.VersionMatchOptions
member.summary: Represents the version match options available.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.VersionMatchOptions.EXACT
member.summary: Ensures the versions are the same.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.VersionMatchOptions.OFFSET
member.summary: Ensure the versions are within a range.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.VersionMatchOptions.DONT_CARE
member.summary: Does not check the versions.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.FactRulesFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the FRF file path or a user var that contains it.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.LotReservationFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the LRF file path or a user var that contains it.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.MrvUserVar
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the user var that contains the Mrv against which to check the mrv value in the LRF file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.OpTypeUserVar
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the user var that contains the OpType against which to check the current OpType value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.FactMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the fact mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.VersionMatch
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the user var that contains the Mrv against which to check the mrv value in the LRF file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.SspecBinsMappingObjectKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the key of the SspecBinMapping to be used on the shared storage.

member.summary: Gets or sets the shared storage context in which the SspecBinsMapping object is stored.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseAtClass.PrimeFuseAtClassTestMethod.VersionOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the offset non matching version can have if VersionMatch is OFFSET.

member.summary: Gets or sets the file handler.

member.summary: Sets to the shared storage a comma delimited string with all the pass bin-sspec-fact bin triads.

member.summary: Pass Bin to Sspec And Fuse At Class Bin Converter class.

member.summary: Translate the sspec into the Fact Bin.
member.param: The shared storage key where the sspecBin are saved.
The shared storage key where the passBin to translate is.
